basic_details.job_title: HPCL Officers Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 116 Junior Executive, Assistant Manager and More Posts

basic_details.short_information: Before diving into details, candidates should review this quick overview of the HPCL Officer Recruitment 2026, which summarizes the organization, total vacancies, application dates, and mode of application in one glance.

application_fee.general_fee: ₹1180 (₹1000 + 18% GST) + payment gateway charges if applicable
application_fee.details: The application fee for HPCL Recruitment 2026 depends on the candidate's category. SC, ST, and PwBD candidates are fully exempted from paying any fee, while other categories must pay a nominal non-refundable amount online. | Payment can be made online via Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI, or Net Banking. The application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances, and candidates should avoid making duplicate payments.

age_limit.details: Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that the maximum age varies by post and experience level, with additional relaxations for reserved categories. The maximum permissible age generally increases with years of relevant experience for senior posts. | Post Max Age Junior Executive – Chemical/Fire & Safety 25 years Senior Officer – Sales 29 to 31 years (based on experience) Assistant Manager – Projects 31 to 33 years Manager – Projects 34 to 36 years Senior Manager – Economist 42 to 44 years Chief Manager (Technical Services/Economist) 45 to 47 years DGM (various streams) 48 to 50 years General Manager 51 to 53 years Chief General Manager – Sales & Marketing 54 to 56 years | Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBCNC, 10 years for PwBD (UR), 13 years for PwBD (OBCNC), and 15 years for PwBD (SC/ST) is applicable. An additional 2 years of age relaxation is given if a candidate's relevant work experience exceeds the minimum prescribed experience. The maximum upper age of any applicant, including all relaxations, cannot exceed 56 years .

qualification.details: Candidates asking about HPCL Recruitment 2026 eligibility should know that qualification and age requirements vary by post. Freshers need a relevant diploma, while experienced positions require engineering degrees, MBA, or specialised post-graduate qualifications along with defined years of experience. | All positions require a minimum of 65% marks (aggregate) for UR/OBCNC/EWS candidates and 55% marks for SC/ST/PwBD candidates in the qualifying degree or diploma. | Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that the maximum age varies by post and experience level, with additional relaxations for reserved categories. The maximum permissible age generally increases with years of relevant experience for senior posts. | Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBCNC, 10 years for PwBD (UR), 13 years for PwBD (OBCNC), and 15 years for PwBD (SC/ST) is applicable. An additional 2 years of age relaxation is given if a candidate's relevant work experience exceeds the minimum prescribed experience. The maximum upper age of any applicant, including all relaxations, cannot exceed 56 years.

salary_details.details: Selected candidates under HPCL Recruitment 2026 will be inducted at the minimum of the applicable pay scale, with Cost to Company (CTC) varying by post level. The table below shows the approximate annual CTC for each pay scale. | The CTC includes Basic Pay, Retirement Benefits, Dearness Allowance, HRA, Cafeteria Allowance, and Performance Related Pay (calculated at maximum). This figure applies to candidates posted in metro cities and may vary for other locations. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: Candidates preparing for the HPCL Junior Executive and Officer Recruitment 2026 should understand that selection involves multiple stages depending on the post applied for. The process combines a Computer Based Test with further shortlisting rounds.
Computer Based Test (CBT): Consists of General Aptitude (English Language

Logical Reasoning & Data Interpretation) and Technical/Professional Knowledge related to the qualifying degree. Tentatively scheduled for August/September 2026. Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must upload/submit supporting documents as per merit and category-wise ratio. Group Task and/or Personal Interview: Conducted for candidates who clear the CBT and document scrutiny stage. Psychometric Assessment: May be conducted before or after the Group Task/Personal Interview. Physical Fitness Efficiency Test (PFET): Applicable where required - includes Working at Height Test
conducted after the medical exam. Pre-Employment Medical Examination (PEME): Conducted in HPCL nominated/empanelled hospitals; there is no provision for re-examination or appeal.

Candidates must secure minimum qualifying marks at each applicable stage to remain in contention. A category and discipline-wise merit list is then prepared based on combined performance across all stages.
how_to_apply: Candidates searching for HPCL Recruitment 2026 Apply Online steps can follow the process below to submit their application successfully before the deadline of 20 July 2026.
Go to the "Careers" section and click on "Current Openings."
Register using a valid, personal email ID and mobile number (must remain active for at least one year).
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and experience details.
Upload photograph and signature as per specified format.
Pay the applicable application fee online (if not SC/ST/PwBD).
Submit the form and take a printout of the acknowledgment/payment receipt for future reference.
No other mode or means of application will be accepted apart from the online portal. Applications with incomplete or incorrect particulars will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 PDF Download Link
content_sections.text: Candidates who want to check the complete HPCL Recruitment 2026 notification PDF, including detailed eligibility, engineering discipline lists, PwBD eligibility, and reservation norms, can download it directly from the official HPCL careers portal at www.hindustanpetroleum.com under the "Current Openings" section before applying. content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Before diving into details, candidates should review this quick overview of the HPCL Officer Recruitment 2026, which summarizes the organization, total vacancies, application dates, and mode of application in one glance.

rows.hindustan_petroleum_corporation_limited_: Officers (Junior Executive, Senior Officer, Assistant Manager, Manager, Chief Manager, DGM, GM, CGM)
Computer Based Test, Group Task, Personal Interview, Document Verification

content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates planning to apply for the HPCL Bharti 2026 should note the key dates below. The application window is open for exactly 20 days, so timely submission is recommended to avoid last-minute technical issues.

content_sections.heading: HPCL Officer Vacancy 2026 Breakdown
content_sections.text: The HPCL Vacancy 2026 is divided into fresher positions (Junior Executive roles) and experienced professional positions ranging from Senior Officer to Chief General Manager. A total of 116 posts are available across various disciplines including Chemical Engineering, Fire & Safety, Sales & Marketing, Projects, Economics, and Gas Sourcing. Category-wise reservation for the two largest fresher categories is also specified in the notification: for Junior Executive – Chemical/Fire & Safety pay scale group (30000-120000), the split is SC-8, ST-4, OBCNC-14, EWS-5, UR-23; for the Senior Officer – Sales group (60000-180000), the split is SC-8, ST-4, OBCNC-13, EWS-5, UR-22.

content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates asking about HPCL Recruitment 2026 eligibility should know that qualification and age requirements vary by post. Freshers need a relevant diploma, while experienced positions require engineering degrees, MBA, or specialised post-graduate qualifications along with defined years of experience. All positions require a minimum of 65% marks (aggregate) for UR/OBCNC/EWS candidates and 55% marks for SC/ST/PwBD candidates in the qualifying degree or diploma. Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that the maximum age varies by post and experience level, with additional relaxations for reserved categories. The maximum permissible age generally increases with years of relevant experience for senior posts. Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBCNC, 10 years for PwBD (UR), 13 years for PwBD (OBCNC), and 15 years for PwBD (SC/ST) is applicable. An additional 2 years of age relaxation is given if a candidate's relevant work experience exceeds the minimum prescribed experience. The maximum upper age of any applicant, including all relaxations, cannot exceed 56 years .

rows.essential_qualification: 3-year full-time Regular Diploma in Chemical Engineering
Any Science Graduate + Diploma in Fire & Safety with valid Heavy Vehicle Driving License
4-year engineering course in Mechanical/Electrical/Instrumentation/Chemical/Civil Engineering AND 2-year full-time MBA/PGDM
4-year full-time engineering course in Civil Engineering
4-year engineering course in Chemical Engineering (Desirable: 2-year MBA)
2-year full-time Post Graduate degree in Economics/Applied Economics/Energy Planning or equivalent
4-year engineering course in any discipline AND 2-year full-time MBA
4-year engineering course in Chemical Engineering (Desirable: 2-year MBA)

content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The application fee for HPCL Recruitment 2026 depends on the candidate's category. SC, ST, and PwBD candidates are fully exempted from paying any fee, while other categories must pay a nominal non-refundable amount online. Payment can be made online via Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI, or Net Banking. The application fee, once paid, is non-refundable under any circumstances, and candidates should avoid making duplicate payments.

rows.application_fee: ₹1180 (₹1000 + 18% GST) + payment gateway charges if applicable

content_sections.heading: HPCL Officer Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates preparing for the HPCL Junior Executive and Officer Recruitment 2026 should understand that selection involves multiple stages depending on the post applied for. The process combines a Computer Based Test with further shortlisting rounds. Computer Based Test (CBT): Consists of General Aptitude (English Language, Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning & Data Interpretation) and Technical/Professional Knowledge related to the qualifying degree. Tentatively scheduled for August/September 2026 . Document Verification: Shortlisted candidates must upload/submit supporting documents as per merit and category-wise ratio. Group Task and/or Personal Interview: Conducted for candidates who clear the CBT and document scrutiny stage. Psychometric Assessment: May be conducted before or after the Group Task/Personal Interview. Physical Fitness Efficiency Test (PFET): Applicable where required - includes Working at Height Test, Endurance Test, and Agility Test, conducted after the medical exam. Pre-Employment Medical Examination (PEME): Conducted in HPCL nominated/empanelled hospitals; there is no provision for re-examination or appeal. Candidates must secure minimum qualifying marks at each applicable stage to remain in contention. A category and discipline-wise merit list is then prepared based on combined performance across all stages.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for HPCL Recruitment 2026 Online
content_sections.text: Candidates searching for HPCL Recruitment 2026 Apply Online steps can follow the process below to submit their application successfully before the deadline of 20 July 2026. No other mode or means of application will be accepted apart from the online portal. Applications with incomplete or incorrect particulars will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 Salary and Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Selected candidates under HPCL Recruitment 2026 will be inducted at the minimum of the applicable pay scale, with Cost to Company (CTC) varying by post level. The table below shows the approximate annual CTC for each pay scale. The CTC includes Basic Pay, Retirement Benefits, Dearness Allowance, HRA, Cafeteria Allowance, and Performance Related Pay (calculated at maximum). This figure applies to candidates posted in metro cities and may vary for other locations. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Service Bond and Retention Amount
content_sections.text: Selected candidates must serve HPCL for a minimum of three years from the date of joining under an executed service bond with surety. This is a mandatory requirement for all officer-level appointments under this recruitment. Additionally, ₹5,000 per month is deducted as retention amount for officers in pay scales ₹30000-120000 or ₹40000-140000 during the first 12 months of probation, while ₹8,000 per month is deducted for pay scales from ₹50000-160000 up to ₹90000-240000. This retention amount is released after 3 years without interest.

content_sections.heading: HPCL Recruitment 2026 Apply Online Link
content_sections.text: The HPCL Recruitment 2026 Apply Online link is active on the official website www.hindustanpetroleum.com from 1 July 2026 (1600 hours) to 20 July 2026 (1500 hours) . Candidates should apply well before the last date to avoid server load issues near the closing time. Direct Link to apply HPCL Officers Recruitment 2026

content_sections.heading: Troubleshooting and Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: Many candidates face avoidable issues while applying for government and PSU recruitment drives. Keeping the following points in mind can help ensure a smooth HPCL Recruitment 2026 application process. Do not wait until the last day (20 July 2026) to submit your application, as heavy website traffic can cause payment or submission failures. Double-check your email ID and mobile number before submission - the notification clearly states no changes will be entertained after submission. Ensure your photograph and signature meet the prescribed format; wrong or missing uploads can lead to cancellation of candidature. Verify your category (UR/EWS/SC/ST/OBCNC/PwBD) carefully before submitting, as category changes are not permitted later. Keep scanned copies of caste certificates, income & asset certificates, and educational documents ready in advance for document verification. Candidates currently employed with HPCL are not eligible to apply for lateral (experienced) positions. Avoid multiple applications - only the latest submitted application will be considered final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for HPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for HPCL Recruitment 2026 is 20 July 2026, up to 1500 hours.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in HPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 116 vacancies across fresher and experienced Officer positions, including Junior Executive, Senior Officer, Assistant Manager, Manager, Chief Manager, DGM, GM, and CGM roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for HPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: UR, OBCNC, and EWS candidates must pay ₹1180 (inclusive of GST), while SC, ST, and PwBD candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for HPCL Junior Executive – Chemical post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a 3-year full-time Regular Diploma in Chemical Engineering with a maximum age of 25 years and minimum 65% marks (55% for SC/ST/PwBD).

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for HPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves a Computer Based Test, document verification, Group Task and/or Personal Interview, Psychometric Assessment, and Physical Fitness Efficiency Test (wherever applicable).

faq.question: Q6. When will the HPCL Computer Based Test be conducted?
faq.answer: The CBT is tentatively scheduled for August/September 2026, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary/CTC for HPCL Officer posts?
faq.answer: CTC ranges from approximately ₹10.99 Lakh for pay scale 30000-120000 up to ₹49.73 Lakh for pay scale 120000-280000, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q8. Is there a service bond for selected HPCL candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates must serve a minimum of three years, with a bond amount of ₹3,00,000 for General category and ₹50,000 for EWS/OBCNC/SC/ST/PwBD candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the maximum age limit for HPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Maximum age varies by post, ranging from 25 years for Junior Executive posts to 56 years (including all relaxations) for senior-most positions like Chief General Manager.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for HPCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through www.hindustanpetroleum.com under Careers → Current Openings from 1 July 2026 to 20 July 2026.
